summary: Tested all 5 fixes: FIX 1 (Protected Numbers), FIX 2 (Law Firm Paywall), FIX 3 (expo-video migration), FIX 4 (Profile Phone), FIX 5 (Client save navigation). Added APP_ENV=development to backend .env to enable dev OTP mode for protected number testing.

minor.issue: APP_ENV was not set in backend/.env — defaults to 'production', making MOCK_OTP 123456 only work for numbers in MOCK_PHONES set. Protected numbers (9538556555, 9861960969) are NOT in MOCK_PHONES so OTP verification fails in production mode. Added APP_ENV=development to fix in test env.

test_results.FIX_1_protected_numbers: PASS - 9538556555 gets plan=pro, planExpiry=+100 years, protected=True on signup via /api/auth/verify-otp
test_results.FIX_2_law_firm_paywall_pro_user: PASS - Pro user (9876543210) taps Law Firm → navigates to /firm (no paywall)
test_results.FIX_2_law_firm_paywall_free_user: PASS - Free user (1111111111) taps Law Firm → PaywallSheet shown with 'Law Firm is a Pro feature'
test_results.FIX_2_law_firm_label: PASS - Free user sees 'Law Firm  🔒 Pro' label; Pro user sees 'Law Firm'
test_results.FIX_3_expo_video_migration: PASS - intro.tsx uses useVideoPlayer + VideoView from expo-video (no expo-av imports). Note: expo-av deprecation warning still appears in expo.err.log from OTHER files, not intro.tsx
test_results.FIX_4_profile_phone: PASS - Profile CONTACT INFO shows '9876543210' correctly (not '—') after backend sync completes
test_results.FIX_5_client_save_navigation: PASS - After creating new client from Clients list (+), navigates back to /clients list (not client detail)

action_items: Consider adding 9538556555 and 9861960969 to MOCK_PHONES for consistency, so they work in both dev and production OTP bypass modes
expo-av deprecation warning '[expo-av]: Expo AV has been deprecated' still appears in expo logs - may be from another file besides intro.tsx. Check all files importing from expo-av.
critical_code_review_comments: signIn() in AppContext.tsx does NOT update plan/planExpiry from advocate response - plan is only updated via loadBackendData() call. This means immediately after login, isProUser may be false until backend sync completes. Users may briefly see 'Get Pro' even if they are Pro.
seed_data_creation: Created test accounts: 9538556555 (protected Pro), 1111111111 (free user), added test clients under 9876543210
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 fixes verified. APP_ENV=development added to backend/.env for testing. Test accounts: 9876543210 (Pro), 1111111111 (Free), 9538556555 (Protected Pro). expo-av deprecation warning in expo logs may come from files other than intro.tsx - worth investigating.
